description:
The network monitoring platform currently lacks a disaster recovery plan. You must configure automated database backups in ManageEngine OpManager to ensure continuity.

First, open a terminal and create a secure local backup directory at `/var/opt/opmanager_backups`. Set its permissions exactly to `750` (e.g., `sudo chmod 750 /var/opt/opmanager_backups`) so only authorized users can access the archives.

Next, log in to the OpManager web interface at http://localhost:8060 (credentials: admin / Admin@123). Navigate to the Database Backup settings (typically under Settings -> General Settings -> Database Backup, or Settings -> Basic Settings -> Database Backup). Enable the Schedule Backup option with the following exact parameters:
- Frequency: Daily
- Execution Time: 01:30 (1:30 AM)
- Destination Directory: /var/opt/opmanager_backups
- Maintain Backup files (Retention): 14 days

Save your configuration.
